items.title: Stale-data practice is NOT told it is healthy this month
items.precondition: PR #210 deployed to dev. A practice whose PMS/referral feed stopped 3+ months ago (Artful / Pawlak, org 8 — the reported case: last real data January, viewing in July).
steps: 1. Log into https://dev.getalloro.com and open the Practice Hub for Artful (org 8) — admin-impersonate if needed.
2. Read the 'one thing' health banner (OneThingBanner) at the top of the hub.
3. Read the stat cards for the stale stage (referrals/PMS).
items.expected: The banner does NOT say 'Your practice is healthy this month'. The stale stage renders an 'unknown' tone / an age statement (e.g. data is N months behind), never a 'positive' all-clear. No health verdict is claimed over data the app cannot currently see.
items.notes: This is the live false-verdict Corey flagged to land first. Cross-check the visible banner against the same screen's revenue tile (which showed the ~52% drop).

items.title: Fresh-data practice still gets a real verdict (no over-suppression)
items.precondition: PR #210 deployed. A practice with current-month or last-month data (One Endodontics or another actively-syncing org).
steps: 1. Open that practice's Practice Hub on https://dev.getalloro.com.
2. Read the health banner and the four stat-card tones.
items.expected: The banner renders a normal verdict (the clean-week exhale when clean, or a named warn/critical gap when earned). Fresh data is NOT downgraded to 'unknown' — the staleness guard only fires on genuinely old data.
items.notes: Guards against the guard: verify the fix did not blanket-mute healthy practices.

items.title: A weak-but-fresh signal shows warn/critical, not a stone 'unknown'
items.precondition: PR #210 deployed. A practice with fresh data whose rank/reviews signal is genuinely weak (low local rank or few recent reviews).
steps: 1. Open that practice's Practice Hub on https://dev.getalloro.com.
2. Read the tone of the weak stage's stat card and whether the verdict names it.
items.expected: The weak stage reads 'warn' or 'critical' and the verdict NAMES the gap — it does not hide inside 'neutral'/'unknown'. (UNKNOWN_IS_NOT_FINE both directions: absent = unknown, measured-weak = warn/critical.)
items.notes: Confirms the fix keeps 'no measurement' and 'measured and weak' distinct, per the file's honesty invariant.

items.title: Unreadable / future month key is treated as unknown, not fresh (no crash, no false healthy)
items.precondition: PR #210 deployed. A practice whose latest data month is missing/unreadable, or a period selection with no month record.
steps: 1. Open the Practice Hub for such a practice / period on https://dev.getalloro.com.
2. Observe the banner and stat cards.
items.expected: The stage renders 'unknown' (abstain), the page does not crash, and no confident 'healthy' verdict is shown. A future/garbage month key never reads as fresh good news.
items.notes: parseYM is lenient (garbage can parse to a stray year); useStageTones gates on a real month record existing. Confirm that gate holds on dev.

items.title: Layer 1 — staleness + verdict unit suites pass
items.expected: Both suites green (they pin monthDataAgeDays/monthsBehind/isMonthStale end-of-month math, unreadable-is-stale, future-not-stale, and the buildHealthVerdict abstain-on-unknown behavior); tsc 0 errors.
items.notes: PR body reports these green with 255 lines of new test. Not independently re-run in this read-only review.
